summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification shard. The preflight artifact hydrated 20 of 40 listed PRs; no shared canonical was invented. Hydrated PRs are classified independently unless live evidence showed draft/author-follow-up/review/technical judgment blockers. Unhydrated job refs are non-mutating needs_human because the artifact does not provide live state or target_updated_at.
